case_title: ROBERT FRANCO et al VS. TURKISH AIRLINES, INC.

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRANCO, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT TURKISH AIRLINES, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-06-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRANCO, ROBERT FRANCO, KATHERINE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TURKISH AIRLINES, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
